since_last: 40% of 100 AI names green; AI Applications & Data Software leads +0.57%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 40% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.38% · BTC -0.90% · Gold -0.25% · Nasdaq100 -0.28%. 40% of 100 AI names are green — broad selling. AI Applications & Data Software is doing the heavy lifting at +0.57%.

cards.headline: AI Applications & Data Software leads, AI Chips & Compute lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Applications & Data Software at +0.57%; weakest is AI Chips & Compute at -1.70%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: DLR is the standout at -7.29%
cards.body: Leaders: ROK +4.17%, AVAV +2.95%, NOW +1.45%, WDAY +1.29%, BABA +1.22%. Laggards: DLR -7.29%, SKHY -6.12%, ARM -3.66%, DELL -3.17%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.02% at $135.3
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.02% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
